title: Implement `takt upgrade` execution and summary flow
description: Implement `command_upgrade()` to execute the decision table, apply or preview file operations, update the manifest, merge config defaults, print per-file actions, and report the final summary with locally modified files.
acceptance_criteria: `takt upgrade` applies the spec decision table for bundled assets, including restore, new install, update, local-modification skip, user-owned skip, and removed-bundle disable behaviors.
`takt upgrade --dry-run` prints the same planned outcomes and config additions without writing files.
Config merge runs as part of upgrade, prints each added key, and preserves existing user values.
Successful upgrade returns exit code 0 even when files are intentionally skipped; only actual failures return non-zero.
